problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
